regions.name: Aceh
regions.background_prompt: majestic Baiturrahman Grand Mosque in Banda Aceh with white domes and lush tropical gardens

female.name: Pakaian Adat Aceh Wanita
female.description: Elegant and modest traditional female dress from Aceh. Features an embroidered long-sleeved blouse (baju meukasah) with intricate gold thread Aceh border embroidery (tekat), paired with a long wrapped skirt with matching gold embroidery borders. A woven silk songket shawl is draped over the head and shoulders modestly.
female.accessories: elaborate golden crown (kopiah meukeutop), gold jewelry, gold tekat embroidered accessories

male.name: Pakaian Adat Aceh Pria
male.description: Dignified traditional male attire from Aceh. Features a black or dark-colored long-sleeved embroidered jacket with gold Aceh-style embroidery borders, paired with matching pants and a rencong dagger at the waist.
male.accessories: kopiah meukeutop hat, rencong dagger, gold embroidered accessories, matching songket sash

regions.name: Sumatera Utara
regions.background_prompt: stunning panoramic view of Lake Toba with traditional Batak Toba houses and lush green hills

female.name: Pakaian Adat Batak Wanita
female.description: Traditional Batak female attire featuring the sacred ulos woven textile draped over the shoulder or wrapped around the body. Rich red, black, and white geometric patterns on hand-woven ulos cloth.
female.accessories: gold headpiece, silver and gold jewelry, ulos draped over shoulder

male.name: Pakaian Adat Batak Pria
male.description: Traditional Batak male ceremonial attire with ulos textile wrapped and draped across the body. Features a mandarin collar shirt with ulos cloth draped over the shoulder.
male.accessories: gold headpiece or songkok hat, gold jewelry, ulos drape

regions.name: Sumatera Barat
regions.background_prompt: iconic Jam Gadang clock tower in Bukittinggi with Minangkabau rooftop architecture and Ngarai Sianok canyon

female.name: Bundo Kanduang
female.description: The iconic Minangkabau female traditional dress. Features a distinctive large wing-shaped gold headpiece (suntiang), a dark silk brocade jacket with gold trimming, embroidered sarong with songket gold threads.
female.accessories: large suntiang gold crown, full gold jewelry set, songket wrap, embroidered shawl

male.name: Baju Taluak Balango Minang
male.description: Traditional Minangkabau male formal attire. Long-sleeved embroidered jacket with gold thread embroidery on black fabric, baggy pants, a songket cloth draped at the waist.
male.accessories: tanjak or destar headwrap, songket sash, traditional keris, gold embroidered accessories

regions.name: Riau
regions.background_prompt: grand An-Nur Mosque in Pekanbaru with Malay-style architecture and palm-lined gardens

female.name: Baju Kurung Melayu Riau
female.description: Traditional Malay Riau female attire featuring a loose-fitting long-sleeved baju kurung top paired with a matching kain songket wraparound skirt.
female.accessories: selendang songket shawl, gold jewelry, floral hairpiece

male.name: Baju Melayu Riau Pria
male.description: Traditional Riau Malay male attire. A collarless long-sleeved top (baju teluk belanga) with songket sampin cloth at the waist and tanjak headwear.
male.accessories: tanjak headwear, songket sampin, keris, formal shoes

regions.name: Jambi

female.name: Baju Kurung Jambi
female.description: Traditional Jambi Malay female attire with baju kurung top and batik Jambi kain wrap.

male.name: Baju Melayu Jambi Pria
male.description: Traditional Jambi Malay male attire with teluk belanga top, sarong, and songkok.
male.accessories: songkok hat, batik sarong, traditional sandals

female.name: Aesan Gede Palembang
female.description: The most elaborate traditional female ceremonial dress from Palembang. Features rich gold songket fabric, a towering crown (siger), and layers of gold jewelry.

male.name: Aesan Gede Palembang Pria

female.name: Kebaya Encim Betawi
female.description: Elegant Betawi Peranakan Chinese-influenced kebaya from Jakarta. Features a colorful embroidered short kebaya with floral embroidery in a Peranakan style, paired with a batik skirt.
female.accessories: floral hair accessories, gold brooches, peranakan porcelain-bead accessories

male.name: Baju Sadariah Betawi
male.description: Traditional Betawi male attire from Jakarta. Plain white or bright-colored long-sleeved mandarin collar shirt paired with batik sarong and a songkok/peci hat.

regions.name: Jawa Barat

female.name: Kebaya Sunda

male.name: Pangsi Sunda
male.description: Traditional Sundanese male outfit with a plain white or light-colored shirt tucked into black loose pants (pangsi), with a sarong wrapped around the waist and iket kepala head cloth.

female.name: Kebaya Jawa

female.name: Kebaya Kartini
female.description: Elegant kebaya inspired by Raden Ajeng Kartini. Long-sleeved fitted lace kebaya in white or soft colors paired with batik jarik wrap skirt.

male.name: Beskap Jawa
male.description: Traditional Javanese formal male attire. A fitted collarless jacket (beskap) in dark fabric with batik kain jarik wrap around the waist.

male.name: Surjan Lurik
male.description: Traditional Javanese male shirt made from lurik woven fabric. Collarless button-front shirt in striped lurik pattern paired with batik jarik sarong.
